basic_details.job_title: NHM SHSRC Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Health Mission State Health Systems Resource Centres (NHM SHSRC)
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission State Health Systems Resource Centres (NHM SHSRC) Advisor - Knowledge Management & Development Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NHM SHSRC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NHM SHSRC Advisor - Knowledge Management & Development Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Medical Graduate from a recognised institution, Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Management / Public Policy or equivalent
qualification.details: Advisor - Knowledge Management & Development: Medical Graduate from a recognised institution and Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Management / Public Policy or equivalent from a recognised university or institution. Minimum 10 years of professional experience in public health, health systems research, policy analysis, knowledge management or programme evaluation.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NHM SHSRC Advisor - Knowledge Management & Development Recruitment 2026 through Online mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHM SHSRC Advisor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NHM SHSRC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NHM SHSRC Advisor - Knowledge Management & Development Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NHM SHSRC Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
NHM SHSRC Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Advisor - Knowledge Management & Development: Medical Graduate from a recognised institution and Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Management / Public Policy or equivalent from a recognised university or institution. Minimum 10 years of professional experience in public health, health systems research, policy analysis, knowledge management or programme evaluation.

content_sections.heading: NHM SHSRC Advisor - Knowledge Management & Development Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
NHM SHSRC Advisor - Knowledge Management & Development Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NHM SHSRC Advisor - Knowledge Management & Development Recruitment 2026 through Online mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHM SHSRC Advisor - Knowledge Management & Development Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHM SHSRC Advisor – Knowledge Management & Development recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NHM SHSRC Advisor – Knowledge Management & Development post is 23rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by NHM SHSRC?
faq.answer: NHM SHSRC has released a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Advisor – Knowledge Management & Development.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Advisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Medical Graduates with a Postgraduate qualification in Public Health, Community Medicine, Preventive & Social Medicine, Health Management, Public Policy, or an equivalent field.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Advisor – Knowledge Management & Development post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this NHM SHSRC job?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Online. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Advisor – Knowledge Management & Development position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. How many years of experience are required for the Advisor role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 10 years of professional experience in public health, health systems research, policy analysis, knowledge management, or programme evaluation is required.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will direct you to the relevant pages.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.
